heading: Importing motor vehicles on a temporary basis
label: 30144 Importing motor vehicles on a temporary basis

L. 100–562, § 2(b)102 Stat. 282330144(b)15:1397(h) (2d, 3d sentences).30144(c)15:1397(h) (last sentence).In subsection (a)(1)(B), the word “importation” is substituted for “entry” for clarity and consistency in this chapter.In subsection (b), before clause (1), the words “that an individual is a member described under subsection (a) of this section” are substituted for “such status” for clarity. children.label: A
children.text: the personnel of the government of a foreign country on assignment in the United States or a member of the Secretariat of a public international organization designated under the International Organizations Immunities Act ( et seq.); and22 U.S.C. 288

children.label: B
children.text: the class of individuals for whom the Secretary of State has authorized free importation of motor vehicles; or
the armed forces of a foreign country on assignment in the United States.
resides in the United States; and
is a member described under subsection (a) of this section.

children.heading: .—Sale in the United States
children.label: c .—Sale in the United States
children.text: A motor vehicle imported under this section may not be sold when in the United States.
